creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
As far as I know, Bugzilla remains the norm for updates to a port.

Please see the linked handbook, and, more generally:

FreeBSD workflow working group
<https://gitlab.com/bsdimp/freebsd-workflow>

(There's more flexibility around the documentation tree than the ports tree.)

I can't sign in to GitHub at the moment, so I can't tell what, if anything, is missing from what you created there.

Hint
====

Appending .diff to the tail of the URL of the PR gives us:

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/pull/137.diff>

-- there's a redirect to produce a diff:

<https://patch-diff.githubusercontent.com/raw/freebsd/freebsd-ports/pull/137.diff>
